careers.title: Clinical Skills Lab Coordinator
careers.summary: Support hands-on nursing and allied-health skills training across FAHI learning centres.
careers.description: We are looking for a coordinator to prepare lab sessions, maintain equipment, and support instructors during skills assessments. Experience in simulation or skills lab environments is an advantage.

careers.title: Admissions Support Officer
careers.summary: Help prospective students complete applications and understand programme pathways.
careers.description: Join the admissions team to respond to enquiries, guide applicants through online forms, and coordinate with campus administrators. Strong written and spoken English and Kiswahili preferred.

careers.title: LMS & Digital Learning Assistant
careers.summary: Support hybrid and online learners with LMS access, schedules, and basic technical help.
careers.description: Assist tutors and students with the learning platform, track attendance records, and escalate technical issues. Familiarity with Moodle or similar LMS tools is helpful.
